description: Create a content slide with a full-width stacked vertical bar chart showing the distribution of buyout funds by fundraising success and time to close from 2017 to 2022.

header.headline: Despite headlines from big successful fundraisings, reality is most funds are on the road for more than a year or do not hit their target
header.sub: Disribution of buyout funds closed by fundraising success, time and target achievement

series.name: Closed on or over target in <1 year
Closed on or over target in 1-2 years
Closed under target and/or in >2 years
